c.d: Average rating of the app given by users on various platforms.

c.d: Total number of active users of the app.
c.s: Company reports, Market analysis reports, TechCrunch, Statista

c.d: Ability of the app to integrate with other tools and services.

c.d: Ease of use and design quality of the app.

c.d: Level of security and privacy features offered by the app.
